scripts.check:sqlc: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && cp -R internal/htmlshare/state "$tmp/state" && npm run sqlc && diff -qr "$tmp/state" internal/htmlshare/state
scripts.build: npm run check:sqlc && npm --prefix web/app run build && go build -trimpath -ldflags="-s -w" -o /tmp/htmlshare ./cmd/htmlshare && go build -trimpath -ldflags="-s -w" -o /tmp/htmlshare-mcp ./cmd/htmlshare-mcp
